title: POPOYU Frozen Table Cloth Party,Frozen Tablecloth,Snowflake Kids Frozen Party Table Cover, 130 * 220cm Plastic Waterproof Table Cover for Winter Girls' Frozen PrincessParty, Baby Shower, Christmas
features: ❄️「Frozen Snowflake Tablecloths」 Snowflake tablecloths that will work well for your party decorating needs. Designed with starry blue background and white snowflakes, like snowflakes falling from the starry sky, beautiful and full of artistic conception, can be used as frozen tablecloth for birthday party, winter tablecloth for party, Christmas tablecloth, etc.

❄️「Christmas winter element design」 These winter holiday frozen table cloth with starry sky blue as the background, blue and purple gradient color features, dotted with different shapes of white, blue, silver snow like snow falling under the stars, to create a very festive winter atmosphere is very suitable for the needs of Christmas snowflake theme holiday

❄️「High Quality」 The Christmas winter plastic table cover is made of high-quality thick PE plastic material, printed with vibrant patterns, reliable and not easy to tear, lightweight and portable, waterproof and stain-resistant, so you can use it with confidence.
❄️「Versatile Party Supplies」 Suitable for both Christmas gatherings and Frozen-themed birthday parties, these frozen tablecloths add a touch of magic and elegance to your celebrations.

❄️「Easy to Clean」 The blue snowflake tablecloth keeps your table free from splattered juices, grease and grime. You don't need to clean up the mess, just throw them away after the party, saving your time and allowing you to immerse yourself in the party with your family and friends.
description: Safety Warning Attention: This product contains small parts that can pose a choking hazard for toddlers and pets. Please use it under adult supervision. Follow the cleaning instructions to avoid the release of harmful chemicals.
